2.content:
# Information
##### V1

This dashboard provides visibility into how users are engaging with Dynatrace onboarding launchpads. By offering actionable insights, it helps ensure a smooth onboarding experience and supports managers in driving user enablement and platform adoption.

4.title: Top 10 Onboarding Launchpad Users
4.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter dt.app.id == "dynatrace.launcher"
| parse resource, """LD "documents/" LD: launch.id"""
| lookup [ fetch dt.system.events, from: - 30d 
| filter isNotNull(user.email)
| summarize count(), by:{user.id, user.email}
], sourceField:user.id, lookupField:user.id
| fieldsRename user.email = lookup.user.email
| filterOut isNull(launch.id) and isNull(launchpad.name)
| fieldsRename launchpad.name = launch.id
| filter matchesPhrase(launchpad.name, "onboarding-")
| filterOut matchesPhrase(launchpad.name, "metadata") OR matchesPhrase(launchpad.name, "content")
| summarize count = count(), by:{user.email}
| limit 10

5.title: Most Frequently Used Onboarding Launchpads

6.title: Total Onboarding Launchpad Access
6.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter dt.app.id == "dynatrace.launcher"
| parse resource, """LD "documents/" LD: launch.id"""
| lookup [ fetch dt.system.events, from: - 30d 
| filter isNotNull(user.email)
| summarize count(), by:{user.id, user.email}
], sourceField:user.id, lookupField:user.id
| fieldsRename user.email = lookup.user.email
| filterOut isNull(launch.id) and isNull(launchpad.name)
| fieldsRename launchpad.name = launch.id
| filter matchesPhrase(launchpad.name, "onboarding-")
| filterOut matchesPhrase(launchpad.name, "metadata") OR matchesPhrase(launchpad.name, "content")
| summarize count = count()

8.title: Onboarding Launchpad Usage Distribution

9.title: Most Frequent Users and Onboarding Launchpads

10.title: Onboarding Launchpad Access by Users Overtime
10.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter dt.app.id == "dynatrace.launcher"
| parse resource, """LD "documents/" LD: launch.id"""
| lookup [ fetch dt.system.events, from: - 30d 
| filter isNotNull(user.email)
| summarize count(), by:{user.id, user.email}
], sourceField:user.id, lookupField:user.id
| fieldsRename user.email = lookup.user.email
| filterOut isNull(launch.id) and isNull(launchpad.name)
| fieldsRename launchpad.name = launch.id
| filter matchesPhrase(launchpad.name, "onboarding-")
| filterOut matchesPhrase(launchpad.name, "metadata") OR matchesPhrase(launchpad.name, "content")
| makeTimeseries count = count(), by: {user.email}, interval: 1m
